    shoot(double, double) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Player
    Fires the currently selected weapon towards the target coordinates.

    Calculates the position of MeleeHitBox and creates one

    Calculates position for Bullet and creates one

    ShootingSlime - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The ShootingSlime class represents an enemy that uses ranged attacks.
    ShootingSlime(double, double) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.ShootingSlime
    Constructs a ShootingSlime with the specified position and default dimensions (1, 1).
    ShootingSlime(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.ShootingSlime
    Constructs a ShootingSlime with the specified position and dimensions.
    shootingSound - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
     
    Shotgun - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.weaponInstances
    Shotgun represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.

    Slime - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Slime class represents a melee enemy that follows a defined behavior.

    Constructs a new Slime with the specified position and default dimensions (1, 1).
    Slime(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Slime
    Constructs a new Slime with the specified position and dimensions.
